allow: Bash(curl -s http://127.0.0.1:8765/state echo "--- top-level keys ---" python3 -c "import json; s=json.load\(open\('/tmp/state.json'\)\); print\(sorted\(s.keys\(\)\)\)" echo echo "--- which controller is the user actually running? ---" ps -ef)
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('grasping:',s.get\('ee_grasping_block'\)\); [print\(n, [round\(x,3\) for x in b['pos']]\) for n,b in s['blocks'].items\(\)]")
Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(list\(s.keys\(\)\)\); print\(json.dumps\(s.get\('end_effector'\) or s.get\('pinch'\) or {}, indent=2\)[:300]\)")

Bash(python3 -c "import sys,json; s=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\('grasping:',s.get\('ee_grasping_block'\)\); [print\(n, [round\(x,3\) for x in b['pos']]\) for n,b in s['blocks'].items\(\)]; print\('ee:', [round\(x,3\) for x in s['ee_pos']]\)")
